title: Aptech is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Aptech is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Aptech, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
